data.description: The Oath of Vengeance by a paladin revolves around punishing wrongdoers. When you take this oath at 3rd level, you gain the following Channel Divinity options: Abjure Enemy, Fight the Greater Evil, No Mercy for the Wicked, My Faith Is Unshakable, and By Any Means Necessary.

Your arrow strikes the target with deadly accuracy. When you hit a creature with a ranged weapon attack, you can cause the攻击被截断了，只剩下“Hunter's Mark”这部分。根据规则提取，这部分可能是指一个特定的奥义或咒语效果，但具体内容需要完整才能准确描述。由于提供的文本不完整，我们将名称作为描述。
A figure's speed drops to 0 and it must succeed a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute.

entities.name: I or the Vow of Enmity

data.description: As an action, you can utter a vow of enmity against a creature within 10 feet of you. You gain advantage on rolls to hit that creature with attacks and spells. The target takes Oedd damage.

By level, supernatural focus you helps dose 7th your off a retrea!. When hit ereature with an foe's opportunity attaek, ean up half you move to your speed immediately the and part after attaek as of the same reaetion. This movement doesn't provoke opportunityattaeks.
